subcodes.first_line: The Beauty of the All-Merciful hath been made manifest - may the spirit of all who dwell in the realms of glory be a sacrifice unto Him! The Countenance of the All-Bountiful hath dawned from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر جمال الرحمن روح من فی ممالک السبحان فداه قد طلع وجه المنان عن افق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
